zh.Wolfhall, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Seymour於大約1425年出生在英國維爾爾素斯 薩維爾納可 煙雨 布利姆斯拉德 安德 卡德利時，他的父親Sir John Seymour I25歲，母親Lady Isabel William22歲。他於1448年之前與Jane Arundell結婚。他於1457年在英國維爾爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1463年8月12日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Seymour was born about 1425, in South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir John Seymour I, was 25 and his mother, Lady Isabel William, was 22. He married Jane Arundell before 1448. In 1457, at the age of 33, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Wiltshire, England. He died on 12 August 1463, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Seymour est né environ 1425, à South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Seymour I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel William, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jane Arundell avant 1448. En 1457, à l’âge de 33 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 août 1463, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Seymour um 1425 in South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Seymour I 25 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel William 22. Er hat vor 1448 Jane Arundell geheiratet. 1457, als er 33 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. August 1463 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Morì il 12 agosto 1463, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: 영국 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리
ko.lifeSummary: John Seymour(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Seymour I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel William(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1448년 이전 Jane Arundell(와)과 결혼했다. 1457년, 33세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1463년 8월 12일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Seymour nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Seymour I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel William, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Arundell antes 1448. Em 1457, com 33 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1463, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Seymour родился около 1425 г. в местности соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Seymour I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel William, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Arundell перед 1448 г. В 1457 году, в возрасте 33 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности уилцхир, Англия. Он умер 12 августа 1463 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.
